det_check_template:
proof fn det_kill_process_none_root(pre_self_: ProcessManager, proc_ptr: ProcPtr, post1_self_: ProcessManager, r1: (PagePtr, Tracked<PagePerm4k>), post2_self_: ProcessManager, r2: (PagePtr, Tracked<PagePerm4k>))
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.proc_dom().contains(proc_ptr)), (pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).owned_threads@ == Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty()), (pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).children@ == Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty()), (pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).depth != 0),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.container_dom() == pre_self_.container_dom())
            &&& (containers_tree_unchanged(pre_self_, post1_self_))
            &&& (post1_self_.proc_dom() == pre_self_.proc_dom().remove(proc_ptr))
            &&& (processes_fields_unchanged(pre_self_, post1_self_))
            &&& (post1_self_.thread_dom() == pre_self_.thread_dom())
            &&& (threads_unchanged(pre_self_, post1_self_))
            &&& (post1_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure().remove(r1.0))
            &&& (pre_self_.page_closure().contains(r1.0))
            &&& (r1.0 == r1.1@.addr())
            &&& (r1.1@.is_init())
            &&& (pre_self_.container_dom().contains(r1.0) == false)
            &&& (post1_self_.get_proc(pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children@ =~= 
                pre_self_.get_proc(pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children@.remove_value(proc_ptr))
            &&& (post1_self_.get_proc(pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children.len() == 
                pre_self_.get_proc(pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children.len() - 1)
            &&& (forall|p_ptr:ProcPtr| #![auto] post1_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr) && p_ptr != pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()
                ==>
                post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr).children == pre_self_.get_proc(p_ptr).children)
            &&& (forall|p_p_ptr:ProcPtr|
                #![trigger post1_self_.get_proc(p_p_ptr)]
                pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).uppertree_seq@.contains(p_p_ptr) 
                ==>
                post1_self_.get_proc(p_p_ptr).subtree_set@ =~= 
                    pre_self_.get_proc(p_p_ptr).subtree_set@.remove(proc_ptr))
            &&& (forall|p_ptr:ProcPtr|  #![auto] post1_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr)
                ==>
                post1_self_.get_proc(p_ptr).uppertree_seq == pre_self_.get_proc(p_ptr).uppertree_seq)
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.container_dom() == pre_self_.container_dom())
            &&& (containers_tree_unchanged(pre_self_, post2_self_))
            &&& (post2_self_.proc_dom() == pre_self_.proc_dom().remove(proc_ptr))
            &&& (processes_fields_unchanged(pre_self_, post2_self_))
            &&& (post2_self_.thread_dom() == pre_self_.thread_dom())
            &&& (threads_unchanged(pre_self_, post2_self_))
            &&& (post2_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure().remove(r2.0))
            &&& (pre_self_.page_closure().contains(r2.0))
            &&& (r2.0 == r2.1@.addr())
            &&& (r2.1@.is_init())
            &&& (pre_self_.container_dom().contains(r2.0) == false)
            &&& (post2_self_.get_proc(pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children@ =~= 
                pre_self_.get_proc(pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children@.remove_value(proc_ptr))
            &&& (post2_self_.get_proc(pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children.len() == 
                pre_self_.get_proc(pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()).children.len() - 1)
            &&& (forall|p_ptr:ProcPtr| #![auto] post2_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr) && p_ptr != pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).parent.unwrap()
                ==>
                post2_self_.get_proc(p_ptr).children == pre_self_.get_proc(p_ptr).children)
            &&& (forall|p_p_ptr:ProcPtr|
                #![trigger post2_self_.get_proc(p_p_ptr)]
                pre_self_.get_proc(proc_ptr).uppertree_seq@.contains(p_p_ptr) 
                ==>
                post2_self_.get_proc(p_p_ptr).subtree_set@ =~= 
                    pre_self_.get_proc(p_p_ptr).subtree_set@.remove(proc_ptr))
            &&& (forall|p_ptr:ProcPtr|  #![auto] post2_self_.proc_dom().contains(p_ptr)
                ==>
                post2_self_.get_proc(p_ptr).uppertree_seq == pre_self_.get_proc(p_ptr).uppertree_seq)
        }) ==> det_kill_process_none_root_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
